hooks.prompt:
DJ Music Plugin MCP server is available. You have access to 44 DJ tools via the dj-music MCP server:

**Core** (always visible): list_tracks, get_track, manage_tracks, list_playlists, get_playlist, manage_playlist, list_sets, get_set, manage_set, get_track_features, search, filter_tracks, build_set, rebuild_set, score_transitions, get_set_cheat_sheet, suggest_next_track, explain_transition, find_replacement, compare_set_versions, quick_set_review, unlock_tools, list_platforms

**Extended** (unlock via unlock_tools): deliver_set, export_set, find_similar_tracks, import_tracks, download_tracks, classify_mood, audit_playlist, review_set_quality, distribute_to_subgenres, get_library_stats, sync_playlist, push_set_to_ym, ym_search, ym_get_tracks, ym_get_album, ym_artist_tracks, ym_playlists, ym_likes

**Hidden** (explicit unlock): analyze_track, analyze_batch, separate_stems

Use `/build-set`, `/expand-playlist`, `/deliver-set`, `/curate-library`, `/ym-sync` for guided workflows.
